about.description: At Bodhisatvvam, we focus on revitalizing your mental strength, emotional well-being, and physical health. Whether through one-on-one NLP therapy or our handcrafted energy-infused products, our goal is to help you overcome fear, anxiety, and negativity.

consultation.title: Unsure Where to Start?
consultation.description: Every healing journey is unique. Connect with Neepa for a Free Consultation to find the right path and remedies tailored specifically for your energy needs.

items.text: After just one session with Neepa, I felt a shift in my energy that I hadn't experienced in years. The chakra healing brought me clarity and peace I didn't know was possible.
items.name: Ananya S.

items.text: The Protection Salt has been incredible for my home. The energy of our entire house shifted within days. My family noticed it too — calmer, more harmonious.
items.name: Rajesh M.

items.text: I was skeptical at first, but the NLP therapy session changed my perspective entirely. I've overcome anxiety that held me back for years. Truly grateful.
items.name: Priya K.

items.text: The custom-made candle Neepa created for my business intention started showing results within the first week. My client inquiries doubled!
items.name: Deepak T.

items.text: The Garbh Sanskar therapy was a beautiful experience. Neepa's gentle guidance during my pregnancy brought so much positivity. My baby is healthy and happy!
items.name: Sneha J.

items.text: I've been using the Money Attract Salt for 3 months now. The financial blocks I was facing have slowly but surely dissolved. Highly recommend Bodhisatvvam.
items.name: Vikram P.
